title: Agent
description: Gruper Distributed agent node record. Represents a machine (desktop, server, EC2 instance) running the agent runtime and registered with the orchestrator.

id.description: Primary key. UUID v4. Stable across reconnects.

owner_id.description: User.id of the owner. Cryptographically bound at registration — the owner signs the registration request and the orchestrator records their public key as the identity anchor.

pubkey.description: Base64url-encoded ed25519 public key used to verify the registration signature.

x25519_pubkey.description: Base64url-encoded X25519 public key for E2E payload encryption (WP-16 / gd-0.5). Null until the agent runtime supports encryption. Required for cross-owner tasks after gd-0.5.

name.description: Human-readable agent name. Shown in the Manager Console fleet view.

location_tag.description: Free-form location label for display and routing hints (e.g. 'home-office', 'collab-locale2', 'aws-us-west-2'). Not used for policy enforcement.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or region label (e.g. 'US', 'EU'). Used for data-class routing policy enforcement on confidential tasks.

items.description: Cached summary of active share grants covering this agent. Populated by the orchestrator; agent runtime uses this for local dispatch validation.

status.description: Current operational status. idle=available; busy=executing task; offline=no heartbeat >90s; degraded=circuit-breaker tripped (3 consecutive Ollama failures); draining=completing current task then terminating (spot instances).

runtime_version.description: Semantic version of the installed agent runtime, prefixed with the milestone track.

last_seen.description: Timestamp of the most recent heartbeat received. Null before first heartbeat.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of initial registration.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata (pool membership, cloud instance ID, etc.).

AgentCapabilities.description: Reported hardware, model, and tool capabilities. Extends Gruper core's per-agent config schema with machine-level fields.

models.description: Ollama model tags currently available on this agent, in preference order.

tools.description: Tool plugins installed and available for tasks on this agent.

roles.description: Gruper core role templates this agent is pre-configured for. Maps directly to the 12 core templates plus 'custom'.

AgentAvailability.description: Owner-configured availability schedule. The orchestrator honors these windows when dispatching tasks from grantees (not from the owner).

always_on.description: If true, availability windows are ignored. Appropriate for always-on mini-PCs and cloud instances.

windows.description: Availability windows in 'DAY[ -DAY] HH:MM-HH:MM IANA/Timezone' format. Grantee tasks are rejected outside these windows.
